description: S3 uploads bucket had permissive ACL option enabled in Terraform; Block Public Access prevented exposure.
resolution: Hardened bucket policy, enforced Block Public Access at org level, added AWS Config rule for public S3 detection.

description: Login endpoint lacked strict rate limiting, enabling credential stuffing attempts from known bad IP ranges.
resolution: Added Cloudflare WAF rate limits and bot filtering, implemented app-level throttle and progressive lockouts, unified error messages to prevent account enumeration.

description: Refresh tokens were long-lived without rotation, increasing session fixation risk.
resolution: Risk accepted temporarily with monitoring; token rotation slated for Q3 roadmap; added admin-session expiry reduction.

description: Stripe webhook endpoint initially missing signature verification; detected in staging review.
resolution: Enabled signature verification and timestamp tolerance checks, rotated webhook secret, added automated test to enforce verification.

description: Redis eviction of CSRF nonces caused intermittent login/checkout flow failures during peak traffic.
resolution: Increased Redis memory, tuned TTLs, added fallback retry on nonce validation, added alarms for keyspace hits/evictions.
